overview: HYR with Garima is a full-featured fitness and body transformation studio platform. It features a transformation gallery with before-and-after sliders, a booking calendar for personalized training sessions, a nutrition hub with macro tracking and meal plans, a member progress portal with measurement logging and charts, and a powerful admin dashboard for managing members, plans, and content.
features: Booking calendar for personalized training sessions
Success stories section with client testimonials
Nutrition hub with macro tracking and meal plans
Member progress portal with body measurement logs and charts
Admin dashboard to manage members, plans, and content
Role-based access: member and admin roles
Downloadable recipe guides by fitness goal
